should_trigger.prompt: Walk me through this plan so I understand it
Brief me on the plan.md before I start working
Explain this plan interactively — I have questions
Can you give me a summary of what this plan involves?
Ugh, just explain plan real quick, I don't have all day.
Summarize review of this Grape API diff.
walk me thru the ruby changes
Please, can you explain plan for me?
Provide a concise technical walkthrough of the proposed Rails architectural changes.
I'm drowning in this diff, just summarize review it for me now.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Create a new plan for the auth refactor
Start working on the plan tasks
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch
Write a new plan for the Grape endpoint.
Can you refactor this Ruby code to be more efficient?
Summarize the git commit history for this week.
Explain how Ruby on Rails works in general.
Review my code for any potential security vulnerabilities.
How do I implement a Grape API in Rails?
Refactor this Ruby code to be more concise.
Create a summary of my daily standup notes.
Explain the difference between Ruby and Python.

hard_should_trigger.prompt: I want to understand what this plan does before approving it
After fixing the bug, also check if brief needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Enhance this existing plan with more research
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
